evals.prompt: scaffold a BudgetOverview feature — package is budget/overview, needs back and edit handlers
evals.expected_output: BudgetOverviewComponent.kt, BudgetOverviewViewModel.kt, DefaultBudgetOverviewViewModel.kt, BudgetOverviewViewProvider.kt, OnBudgetOverviewBackHandler.kt, OnBudgetOverviewEditHandler.kt all created under zero-core/src/main/java/com/hluhovskyi/zero/budget/overview/. Build passes.

assertions.name: closeables-of-pattern
assertions.description: attach() uses Closeables.of { coroutineScope.launch { } } — not Closeable { job.cancel() }

assertions.name: no-dispatcher-provider-in-dependencies
assertions.description: Dependencies interface does NOT contain DispatcherProvider

assertions.name: both-handlers-generated
assertions.description: OnBudgetOverviewBackHandler.kt and OnBudgetOverviewEditHandler.kt both exist with Noop companion

assertions.name: internal-implementations
assertions.description: DefaultBudgetOverviewViewModel and BudgetOverviewViewProvider are marked internal

evals.prompt: I need to add a new screen for showing import history. scaffold ImportHistory feature, package imports/history, just needs a back handler
evals.expected_output: ImportHistoryComponent.kt, ImportHistoryViewModel.kt, DefaultImportHistoryViewModel.kt, ImportHistoryViewProvider.kt, OnImportHistoryBackHandler.kt created under zero-core/src/main/java/com/hluhovskyi/zero/imports/history/. Build passes.

assertions.name: only-back-handler
assertions.description: OnImportHistoryBackHandler.kt exists but no edit/saved handler file
